notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Logan Gilbert on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Victor Robles GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Victor Robles grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Mitch Garver out at 2nd. Victor Robles out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luke Raley pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley flies out sharply to right fielder Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone grounds out softly, catcher Salvador Perez to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
